gene_region.label: PTEN transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical PTEN genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: PTEN encodes PTEN, a lipid and protein phosphatase that opposes PI3K signaling. This bundle emphasizes PIP3 dephosphorylation, AKT pathway restraint, cell growth control, genomic stability, and tumor-suppressor biology.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local PTEN bundle is PI3K restraint and tumor-suppressor review oriented. Interpret markers through exact allele class, zygosity, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context rather than as stand-alone deterministic calls.
variant_effect_overview: PTEN variants can alter or tag PIP3 dephosphorylation, AKT pathway restraint, cell growth control, genomic stability, and tumor-suppressor biology; effect direction depends on allele class, tissue, dosage, and biological context.
Common markers, pharmacogenetic alleles, structural events, and high-impact pathogenic variants should be kept separate during interpretation.
condition_research_overview: PTEN hamartoma tumor syndrome review context
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: PTEN methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a PIP3 dephosphorylation, AKT pathway restraint, cell growth control, genomic stability, and tumor-suppressor biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for PTEN.
Because PTEN biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against PIP3 dephosphorylation, AKT pathway restraint, cell growth control, genomic stability, and tumor-suppressor biology.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use PTEN promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for PIP3 dephosphorylation, AKT pathway restraint, cell growth control, genomic stability, and tumor-suppressor biology.
PTEN hamartoma tumor syndrome review context

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000171862: PTEN coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: PTEN biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: PTEN: PIP3 dephosphorylation, AKT pathway restraint, cell growth control, genomic stability, and tumor-suppressor biology
biorender_visuals.template_title: Intracellular Layout - Receptor Signaling from Plasma Membrane to Nucleus (2)
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a PTEN PI3K restraint and tumor-suppressor review thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to PIP3 dephosphorylation, AKT pathway restraint, cell growth control, genomic stability, and tumor-suppressor biology and PTEN hamartoma tumor syndrome review context, PI3K-AKT pathway regulation. Treat this as pathway triage until the exact allele has external classification and phenotype support.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: PTEN loss-of-function model is curated as a PTEN marker for PTEN hamartoma tumor syndrome review context, PI3K-AKT pathway regulation. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the PIP3 dephosphorylation, AKT pathway restraint, cell growth control, genomic stability, and tumor-suppressor biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag PIP3 dephosphorylation, AKT pathway restraint, cell growth control, genomic stability, and tumor-suppressor biology.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
associated_conditions: PTEN hamartoma tumor syndrome review context
research_context: Use this marker as a PTEN pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair PTEN loss-of-function model with PTEN methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: PTEN loss-of-function model or linked PTEN locus genotype states
